text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? I'm hungry, so I'm eating. Duh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you want me to eat a "real meal"
or whatever, but supplements and cereal just
get the job done more efficiently.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As long as I get my nutrients, it doesn't 
matter what I eat. I mean, if it tastes good 
then cool, but that's not what matters 
most to ——
